entities.name: SMALL MILLETS
entities.description: A group of underutilized, climate-smart, and nutrient-rich crops including finger, foxtail, proso, kodo, little, and barnyard millets

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART
entities.description: The ability of a crop to be produced sustainably under changing climate conditions

entities.name: NUTRIENT RICH
entities.description: Having a high concentration of essential nutrients

entities.name: DIVERSE ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of crops to adapt to various environmental conditions

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The capacity of a cultivar to produce a large amount of crop per unit area

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: Efforts to develop high yielding cultivars of crops

entities.name: PROCESSING AND UTILIZATION TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Modern technologies used for the processing and utilization of crops

entities.name: GERMPLASM COLLECTING
entities.description: The process of gathering genetic resources of crops

entities.name: GERMPLASM CONSERVING
entities.description: The process of preserving genetic resources of crops

entities.name: GERMPLASM EVALUATING
entities.description: The process of assessing the characteristics of genetic resources

entities.name: GERMPLASM UTILIZING
entities.description: The process of using genetic resources for crop improvement

entities.name: POLICY INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Governmental or organizational actions to promote crop cultivation

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The long-term shift in global or regional climate patterns

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Farming practices that meet current food needs without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their needs

entities.name: RURAL HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: Residential units in non-urban areas where small millets are grown and consumed
